title: Minelife SMP Lite
description: The Minelife SMP companion Modpack(Lightweight version)!
body:
# The Minelife SMP
[The Minelife SMP](https://minelifesmp.com/) is a content creation SMP founded by [NitwitsMC](https://www.youtube.com/@nitwitsMC) in October 2020.
It is currently in its third season!

# The Modpack
This is the official Minelife SMP companion Modpack, created to provide the members with an easy way to update their clients to (flawlessly) work with the server!
It additionally provides fans of the SMP with an easy way to recreate the Minelife experience with their friends!

Although the server is completely playable with a vanilla client as of now there are a few optional optimization mods and QOL improvements added by this pack.
There are three different versions of this pack, this is the "**Lite**" version.

# Version Comparison:
|**Lite (this version)**|[Normal](https://modrinth.com/modpack/minelife-smp)|Server (not released yet)|
|:-----------------------:|:----------------------:|:-----------------------:|
|Client                   |Client                  |Server                   |
|very lightweight         |all client functionality|only for server          |

# Content (lite version)

```
  - Optimization
  - Simple Voice Chat
  - Very basic settings
  - Shader support
```

**On behalf of [NitwitsMC](https://www.youtube.com/@nitwitsMC)**
